issues.description: ForceDiscard is incorrect. The effect states opponent places a card 'at the bottom of their deck', which is a return/shuffle action, not a discard. Should use a custom action or clarify intent; ForceDiscard typically means trash/discard to discard pile.
Filter uses 'excludeSelf' but the card name restriction is [Nefeltari Vivi]. Should use 'excludeCardNames' or similar explicit exclusion instead of generic excludeSelf.
